creator: viktor.dvz@gmail.com
text:
So, I'm add 1Gb. Summary has 3.4Gb. This not enough. During make Vsize was 4.2Gb and it crash (maybe because i haven't disk space at this build). I'm rebuild my swap (add nfs) get 8Gb swap + 0.5 Gb RAM (also increase disk space). And grafana build.
Also it use 6Gb disk space.
Boris благодарю за помощь и скорость реакции.
